label: Abandon real-model evidence as main-paper evidence and use it appendix-only
reason: Safest NeurIPS posture under unfavorable+incomplete Cohere evidence; aligned with claim-safety guardrails
minimum_scope: Immediate manuscript reframing + appendix diagnostic section
stop_condition: Stop when all dominance language is removed from main claims

label: Run OpenAI fallback confirmation before deciding
reason: Useful only as calibration/cross-provider check; must not erase Cohere adverse signal
minimum_scope: GSM8K matched setup; seeds 11/23; budgets 4/6/8; strict_f3 vs external_l1_max with matched-pair reporting
stop_condition: Stop after one bounded confirmation run and update claim table

label: Improve the algorithm before submitting
reason: Negative signal across budgets/seeds suggests method/comparator weakness under this setup
minimum_scope: Pre-registered hypothesis-driven changes with ablation and paired re-eval
stop_condition: Stop if no hypothesized mechanism yields consistent positive paired deltas

label: Complete Cohere to 100 per slice before deciding
reason: Could reduce uncertainty but does not justify blind spending after consistent negative direction
minimum_scope: Only after explicit failure hypothesis and power/cost plan
stop_condition: Stop if interim analysis remains negative with narrowing CI

label: Keep algorithm and only reframe manuscript
reason: Reframing is required, but algorithm-risk remains unresolved for future camera-ready strength
minimum_scope: Use only if submission timeline blocks further experimentation
stop_condition: Stop if team accepts bounded contribution positioning
